evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: CEGER - Centro de Gestão da Rede Informática do Governo is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Portugal, providing digital trust services via ecce.gov.pt.
